tools.name: projects.workflowexecutionsProjectsLocationsWorkflowsExecutionsCancel
tools.description: Cancels an execution of the given name.

tools.name: projects.workflowexecutionsProjectsLocationsWorkflowsExecutionsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new execution using the latest revision of the given workflow.

tools.name: projects.workflowexecutionsProjectsLocationsWorkflowsExecutionsGet
tools.description: Returns an execution of the given name.

tools.name: projects.workflowexecutionsProjectsLocationsWorkflowsExecutionsList
tools.description: Returns a list of executions which belong to the workflow with the given name. The method returns executions of all workflow revisions. Returned executions are ordered by their start time (newest first).

tools.name: projects.workflowexecutionsProjectsLocationsWorkflowsTriggerPubsubExecution
tools.description: Triggers a new execution using the latest revision of the given workflow by a Pub/Sub push notification.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
